evidence: Tier HEAVY facts: new AppVersion model and AppUpdateService module, external GitHub Releases API integration, AppState wiring, Settings/AppShell UI, l10n, README, tests, and 3+ surfaces. Higher-tier facts checked: no auth/security/schema/migration changes requested; external integration and broad wiring are present.
message: ULW sizing requires HEAVY for new modules, external integrations, and broad cross-surface behavior.

steering.evidence: Tier HEAVY facts: new AppVersion model and AppUpdateService module, external GitHub Releases API integration, AppState wiring, Settings/AppShell UI, l10n, README, tests, and 3+ surfaces. Higher-tier facts checked: no auth/security/schema/migration changes requested; external integration and broad wiring are present.
steering.rationale: ULW sizing requires HEAVY for new modules, external integrations, and broad cross-surface behavior.

PASS iff commands succeed or environment blockers are captured precisely, and release docs/config are present.

codeReview.evidence: Review synthesis: goal/security reviewers found Windows asset-priority and unsafe URL launch blockers; both were fixed with HTTPS-only release/asset URL validation and Windows marker plus zip/msix/exe priority. Subsequent app_update_service tests, analyze, full test suite, and focused tests passed. Some review/QA agents failed from external Codex 403 rolling spend limit, not code behavior; residual risk is only host Windows build environment.
